Short CV

Tugce Soylamis graduated from Gazi University, Department of Biology Teaching in 2013. She completed her master's degree in Medical Microbiology at Selçuk University Institute of Health Sciences in 2016. She is currently pursuing her PhD in Medical Microbiology at Istanbul University Institute of Health Sciences. She has a pedagogical formation certificate. He started Uskudar University Vocational School of Health Services Laboratory Technology program as a lecturer in 2017 and still continues.
